objective: Close F-0150 statically by separating internal RAG citations from learner-visible citations and enforcing a server-side allowlist projection that exposes only resource title, heading path, and stale display status across mistake-book and practice learner responses.
blockedFiles: any schema or migration source, real database/data access, permission expansion, Provider behavior/configuration, dependency, deployment, secret/env, external service, PR or force-push

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: internal RagRetrievalResultDto and RagCitationDto -> ai-explanation/hint execution and audit redaction -> student mistake-book runtime and persisted practice feedback -> learner API contracts -> learner UI
preRedImpactScan.attackerPrecondition: an authenticated learner can request mistake-book explanation or read practice feedback containing sufficient RAG citations
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: MistakeBookAiExplanationResultDto and PracticeAnswerFeedbackDto reuse RagCitationDto, exposing chunkText, textHash, score, chunkIndex and internal resource/chunk/generation public identities in learner network responses
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: learner responses contain only normalized resourceTitle, headingPath and optional isStale; internal citations remain available only to retrieval, Provider and redacted audit boundaries
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: sufficient citations still show source title and chapter path; weak/none remains empty; internal grounding, stale handling and audit redaction remain unchanged
preRedImpactScan.authorizationSemantics: existing learner object authorization unchanged; response disclosure is strictly contracted

learnerCitationContract.enforcement: one server-side explicit allowlist mapper used by mistake-book runtime and practice API mapper; no spread, assign, serialize-delete or input reference reuse
learnerCitationContract.validation: runtime-untrusted input; maximum 3 raw citations, 200 title characters, 12 heading segments and 200 characters per segment; C0/C1, newline, bidi controls and non-printable separators rejected; malformed collections fail closed instead of partial filtering
learnerCitationContract.stale: isStale is explicit boolean or null; missing maps only to null and string/number truthy values are rejected
learnerCitationContract.evidenceConsistency: sufficient requires one to three valid citations; weak and none require an empty collection; contradictions fail closed
learnerCitationContract.determinism: ordinal public-fact sort and exact tuple dedup; conflicting stale facts fail closed; score, rank, chunk index and internal identities never influence output order or labels
learnerCitationContract.internalBoundary: RagCitationDto remains internal for retrieval, governed execution and redacted audit; no Provider or RAG semantics change

validationEvidence.red: 2 expected failures proved internal citation fields reached mistake-book and practice learner sinks
validationEvidence.build: exit 0 with the pre-existing NFT trace warning
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: PASS: one explicit learner mapper validates count/text/path/stale/evidence consistency, rejects malformed collections atomically, copies and ordinally sorts public facts, rejects stale conflicts, preserves internal RAG facts, and removes internal identity UI keys

validationCommands.name: state-parse
arguments: strictly parses the F-0150 task contract and WIP state

closeoutProjection.terminalEvidence: only actual commit push sync and cleanup evidence may prove closeout
